Actions.Text: AMEND (T) AND RECOMMIT TO PEOPLE WITH DISABILITIES
REPORTED REFERRED TO WAYS AND MEANS

Title: Relates to requiring the office for people with developmental disabilities to issue a residential request list and placement report
Summary: Requires the office for people with developmental disabilities to issue a residential request list and placement report to the governor, the senate and the assembly.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the mental hygiene law, in relation to requiring the office for people with developmental disabilities to issue a residential request list and placement report to the governor and the legislature
